resources.string: Choose how Thmanyah looks on this device.
All on-screen copy will follow your selection.
Arabic-first discovery sample built with Compose, Hilt, and DataStore.
Applies when you scroll and load the next home page. Does not change how one API response is parsed.
When repeat section rows is off, this also applies while merging the next page into the same sections so behavior stays consistent.
Repeat section rows on next page
When on, each loaded page adds a new copy of every section block. When off, new items are merged into the same sections as the first page.
When on, each section drops duplicate content IDs (per page and, if rows are merged, across the scroll merge). When off, the server order is kept even if IDs repeat.
